title: Generate a compiler design block diagram
desc: Generate a compiler design block diagram
mermaidCode:
flowchart LR
  subgraph LexicalAnalyzer["Lexical Analyzer"]
    LA1[Tokenizer]
    LA2[Scanner]
    LA3[Lexer Rules Engine]
    LA1 --> LA2
    LA2 --> LA3
  end
  subgraph SyntaxParser["Syntax Parser"]
    SP1[LL1 Parser]
    SP2[Syntactic Analysis Tree Builder]
    SP3[Error Handling Module]
    LA3 --> SP1
    SP1 --> SP2
    SP2 --> SP3
  end
  subgraph SemanticAnalyzer["Semantic Analyzer"]
    SA1[Type Checker]
    SA2[Scope Resolver]
    SA3[Code Generation Rules Engine]
    SP2 --> SA1
    SA1 --> SA2
    SA2 --> SA3
  end
  subgraph CodeGenerator["Code Generator"]
    CG1[Ast to Intermediate Representation Converter]
    CG2[Intermediate Representation Optimizer]
    CG3[Target Machine Code Generator]
    SA3 --> CG1
    CG1 --> CG2
    CG2 --> CG3
  end
  LA1 --> SP1
  SP2 --> CG1

title: Generate a block diagram of GSM architec
desc: Generate a block diagram of GSM architecture
mermaidCode:
flowchart LR
  subgraph SG1["Circuit Switched Domain"]
    MSC[Mobile Service Control]
    VLR[Visitor Location Register]
    HLR[Home Location Register]
    BSC[Bidirectional Speech Controller]
    BTS(Base Transceiver Station)
  end
  subgraph SG2["Packet Switched Domain"]
    GGSN[GPRS Gateway Support Node]
    SGSN[Serving GPRS Support Node]
    PGW[P-Gateway]
    SGW(S-Gateway)
  end
  subgraph SG3["Network Interface"]
    IWF[IP Wireless Forwarding Function]
    MGW[Multiplexor Gateway]
  end
  MSC --> VLR
  VLR --> HLR
  BSC --> BTS
  GGSN --> SGSN
  SGSN --> PGW
  PGW --> SGW
  IWF --> GGSN
  MGW --> BSC
